summary: Comprehensive testing of POS system completed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified shop page, order lookup, admin dashboard, exchange rates, payment settings, and POS page. All key features working as expected.

issues: Currency displayed as ¥ (Yuan) instead of $ USD - may confuse Venezuelan customers

passed_tests: GET /api/shop/order-lookup?order_no=xxx - order lookup by order number
POST /api/shop/orders - create online order (inventory validation working)
All authenticated CRUD endpoints (products, stores, warehouses, customers, suppliers)
Shop page at /shop - product display working
Shop orders page at /shop/orders - order search by order number and phone working
Admin dashboard at /admin - login and navigation working
POS page at /pos - login, store selection, price mode switching ($USD, Bs., Mayor) all working

features_verified.manual_exchange_rates: Working - Admin can set USD to VES rate (40.5) and per-category rates
features_verified.pos_price_currency_switching: Working - POS has $USD, Bs., Mayor buttons to switch price mode
features_verified.online_store_order_tracking: Working - /shop/orders page allows customers to look up orders by order number or phone
features_verified.venezuelan_payment_methods: Working - Bank Transfer and Pago Móvil fully configured with preview
features_verified.whatsapp_click_to_chat: Working - WhatsApp number 584121234567 configured in payment settings

critical_code_review_comments: All features requested in the problem statement are implemented and working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test order ON2026031301245418A9 with phone 04121234567 for order lookup testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 key features (exchange rates, POS price switching, order tracking, Venezuelan payments, WhatsApp integration) are working. Backend has 25 pytest tests. Main warehouse initialized via /api/init-data. Multiple online orders exist in the system for testing order management.
